title: LifeSmart SUBLIME Panel Classic (Crest 2/Hammered Obsidian Black) SLCY2E35
description:
Lights and Shadows - The Premium Collection turns metal into a canvas of light and texture. With fine laser engraving, soft waves and flowing lines take shape, inviting you to look closer and touch. As light shifts, so do the shadows, giving each panel a quiet, living presence. Premium is ideal for interiors that celebrate artful detail, soft rhythm, and a touch of poetic charm.
Adapter: This SKU default does not include actuators. Need to be ordered together with extra actuators. | Notes: Cover Dimensions：86*86mm； Panel Mounting Projection: 12.5 mm (13.5 mm for textured and deep-carved Pro/Max panels) Mounting Method: The face cover attaches to the flange via magnetic attachment; the flange is fixed to a recessed 86-type back box. Wired CoTP: CoTP 3-pin interface * 1； Wireless CoSS: Supported by the device
availability: Catalogue price list / availability under review
